acceptance.assertion: The evaluation compares at least no-context/no-rLens, reading-pack, context-pack and full/resolved evidence conditions.
Metrics cover localization, evidence completeness, patch scope, check fit, miss taxonomy and false-confidence risk.
The evaluation does not treat agent-written tests or passing checks as independent correctness proof.

goal: Measure whether RepoBrief/Agent Workbench surfaces actually improve agent code work versus no-rLens, reading-pack, context-pack, full-dump and trace-gated conditions.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Vibe-Lab PR #300: a RepoBrief Workbench usefulness evaluation design, condition matrix, required metrics, no-self-proof rule, validator and regression tests now exist. The experiment is explicitly marked not_executed and not promotion-ready until comparable runs exist.
metadata.queue_readiness_repair: 2026-07-09: promoted after PR #323 lifecycle repair because now/next was empty, dependencies are verified, and no open PR blockers were found for heimgewebe/lenskit, heimgewebe/bureau or heimgewebe/vibe-lab.

Local validation before merge: make validate-schemas -> passed.
Local validation before merge: make validate -> passed after make generate-blocking.
Post-merge Vibe-Lab main spot-check: make validate-repobrief-workbench-usefulness-tests and make validate-repobrief-workbench-usefulness -> passed.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t012-comparison: measurement-plan.yml defines no_context_no_rlens, reading_pack, context_pack, full_resolved_evidence and trace_gated conditions.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t012-metrics: measurement-plan.yml requires localization, evidence completeness, patch scope, check fit, miss taxonomy, false-confidence risk and effort overhead metrics.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t012-no-self-proof: measurement-plan.yml declares a required no_self_proof_rule and validator tests reject missing self-proof protections.

title: RepoBrief workbench usefulness evaluation
